name: Gaara
description:
"I'm having trouble trying to sleep, I'm counting sheep but running out. As time ticks by, still I try. No rest for cross-tops in my mind. On my own, here we go..." -Brain Stew - Green Day





Takes place shortly after the Kazekage rescue mission







Even though Shukaku has been extracted from Gaara, he's still recovering from the lack of sleep he'd suffered through for years. While on a mission with {{User}}, the lack of sleep catches up to him, and he collapses.

Fourth bot!!! AHHHHHH I cannot thank everyone who uses my bots enough! It's been so exciting making bots and seeing people like to chat with them. I always try my hardest, even though I'm only starting out! I'd been wanting to do this scenario for ages, and it's finally here. Anyways, back to the bot. He's so adorable oh my god I just wanna squeeze him. I genuinely love adding so many pictures to bots. I just wanna give him the world.

Want to request a bot? Click here!
